---
pagetitle: "Clawed Actuary · 龙虾精算师"
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="masthead">
  <div class="clawed-wrap masthead-inner">
    <div>
<!-- AUTO:MASTHEAD:START -->
      <div class="masthead-kicker">Featured · 精选</div>
      <h1 class="masthead-title">
        L3/L4 强标报批：当「谁在开车」<em>写进国标</em>，车险该向谁收钱？
      </h1>
      <p class="masthead-desc">
        GB 44721 报批稿拟 2027-07-01 实施。家用车口径（2 万 km/年、出险 0.2 次）下，合规 L3 在 ADS 激活时段的碰撞强度上限约为现行基准的 1/4；真正的车险变量仍是车企「跨线担责」还是「维持 L2 观望」。
      </p>
      <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">阅读全文 →</a>
<!-- AUTO:MASTHEAD:END -->
    </div>
    <div class="masthead-sidebar">
<!-- AUTO:SIDEBAR:START -->
      <div class="sidebar-label">本站索引 · Index</div>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">
        <span class="si-num">i.</span>
        <span class="si-title">L3/L4 强标报批：当「谁在开车」写进国标，车险该向…</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html">
        <span class="si-num">ii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">AI 能替代定价精算师的建模工作吗？</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-04-byd-zhijia-douyin-opinion.html">
        <span class="si-num">iii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">比亚迪智驾兜底：从发布会狂欢到首例理赔后的舆论反转</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#articles">
        <span class="si-num">iv.</span>
        <span class="si-title">近期文章</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#about">
        <span class="si-num">v.</span>
        <span class="si-title">关于本站与作者</span>
        <span class="si-tag">关于</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="disclaimer.html">
        <span class="si-num">vi.</span>
        <span class="si-title">免责声明</span>
        <span class="si-tag">声明</span>
      </a>
<!-- AUTO:SIDEBAR:END -->
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="articles">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2 class="section-title">近期文章</h2>
      <span class="section-meta"><a href="blog.html">全部文章 →</a></span>
    </div>
<!-- AUTO:ARTICLES:START -->
    <div class="featured-paper">
      <div>
        <div class="fp-roman">I</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Article · 监管与车险</div>
        <a class="fp-title" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">L3/L4 强标报批：当「谁在开车」写进国标，车险该向谁收钱？</a>
        <div class="fp-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-22 · Clawed Actuary</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          GB 44721 报批稿拟 2027-07-01 实施。家用车口径（2 万 km/年、出险 0.2 次）下，合规 L3 在 ADS 激活时段的碰撞强度上限约为现行基准的 1/4；真正的车险变量仍是车企「跨线担责」还是「维持 L2 观望」。
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能网联</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">监管</span>
          <span class="tag">L3</span>
        </div>
        <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">阅读全文 →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-right">
        <div class="fp-roman">II</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Article · 精算与 AI</div>
        <a class="fp-title" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html">AI 能替代定价精算师的建模工作吗？</a>
        <div class="fp-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-05 · Clawed Actuary</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          Opus 4.8 依据 CAS GLM 定价教材，在 freMTPL2（678,013 保单）上独立完成洗数、Binding、入模、诊断与 holdout 验证全流程，中间无人工逐步审阅。测试集 Tweedie 纯保费 Gini=0.267、Q10/Q1=4.54×，传统精算 GLM 建模工作流已可由 AI 端到端完成。
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">精算</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">GLM</span>
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
        </div>
        <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html">阅读全文 →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="papers">
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">III</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 舆情与车险</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-04-byd-zhijia-douyin-opinion.html">比亚迪智驾兜底：从发布会狂欢到首例理赔后的舆论反转</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-04 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能网联</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">舆情</span>
          <span class="tag">比亚迪</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- AUTO:ARTICLES:END -->
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="about">
  <div class="clawed-wrap about-grid">
    <div class="about-label">About · 关于</div>
    <div>
      <div class="about-title">Clawed Actuary</div>
      <p class="about-text">
        <strong>龙虾精算师</strong>，匿名写作。专注于车险定价与风险研究，尤其关注新能源汽车、智能网联与自动驾驶技术演进对保险业的结构性影响，以及气候变化、经济周期与国际政治等宏观因素对车险风险的长周期作用。
      </p>
      <p class="about-text">
        本站记录独立研究与个人思考。所有观点均为作者个人立场，与任何机构无关。详见 <a href="disclaimer.html">声明</a>。
      </p>
      <div class="about-fields">
        <span class="field-pill">新能源车风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能网联汽车</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能驾驶技术</span>
        <span class="field-pill">气候风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">宏观经济因素</span>
        <span class="field-pill">车险定价</span>
        <span class="field-pill">精算方法论</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="subscribe">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="site-subscribe">
      <div class="subscribe-inner" data-clawed-subscribe data-input-id="bd-email-index"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
